title: Part
description: A single manufacturable panel. Owns its operations in part-local coordinates. See CONVENTIONS.md for coordinate system, banding, mirror, and units rules.

label.description: Human-readable label printed on the DXF (e.g. 'W1: Chap yon').

shape.description: Final assembled panel size (what the customer/factory tracks). Cut size is derived by subtracting edge_banding at DXF draw time.

material_id.description: Foreign key into /data/materials.json. Never duplicate material data here.

edge_banding.description: Banding thickness per edge in mm. 0 means no banding on that edge.

grain_locked.description: If true, this part has a required grain axis and the Optimizer may not rotate it 90/270. If false, free rotation allowed.

operations.description: All machining operations in part-local coordinates. CNC sees only what is in this array.

x_mm.description: X coordinate in part-local frame, origin at bottom-left of Face A.

y_mm.description: Y coordinate in part-local frame, origin at bottom-left of Face A.

depth_mm.description: Drill depth from the face. Use thickness_mm for through-holes.

face.description: Which face is drilled into. Face A = visible/outward face; Face B = opposite.
